full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0878: GTKB-ISOLATION-001 completed the detailed Phase 1 authority matrix plan for GT-KB/application separation. The plan defines the required matrix schema, conventional and GT-KB authority categories, a preliminary Agent Red authority matrix across product artifacts, app-local governed state, scoped services, generated projections, overlays, control-plane operations, environment boundaries, and legacy exceptions, plus owner-decision-pending rows, implementation steps, verification mapping, risks, and dependencies into phases 2 through 9.
explicit_change_request: Owner approved proceeding with the proposed next work item, GTKB-ISOLATION-001, to take advantage of the current session context and create the detailed Phase 1 authority matrix plan.
change_reason: Archive the completed GTKB-ISOLATION-001 authority matrix planning deliverable and supporting evidence.
